name: @linkrunner/skills
description: Installable Agent Skills for integrating the Linkrunner SDK and deep linking into your app, for AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Copilot).

scripts.test: node bin/cli.mjs add flutter --agent claude-code --dir ./.smoke --dry-run && node bin/cli.mjs add flutter --agent cursor --dir ./.smoke --dry-run
